name: Harlows Bus Co
fmcsa_address: 1021 S 23rd Street Suite A, Bismarck, ND 58504
registry_source: Company website (harlowsschoolbus.com); SD SOS not directly fetched (search portal not parseable via WebFetch)
notes: Custer SD address (24050 US Hwy 385) is the Hill City branch location of Harlows School Bus Service Inc, headquartered in Bismarck, ND. Multi-state operator across ND/SD/MT/ID/WA with ~30 locations. USDOT 1662560 is the umbrella entity covering all locations including Custer/Hill City, SD. Note related entities USDOT 321336 (Harlow's Bus Service Inc, Bismarck, charter), USDOT 1195546 (Harlow's Bus Sales Inc), USDOT 703193 (Harlow's School Bus Service Inc of Montana).
